name: Dazai and Chuuya
description:
Submissive alternative to link

Admittedly I wasn’t sure how exactly to make this one; I don’t usually write from you pov of the character being dominated ifykwim. Hope it’s not too bad, wasn’t as into it 😔

Another admission: I don’t care for Bungou stray dogs. I tried getting into it when i heard two of my favorite authors (Akutagawa and Dostoyevsky) were characters in it, but I just couldn’t get into it. I like character designs and the writing is decent enough (although does anyone really know what’s going on in the latest chapters??) but there’s just something about it. I also don’t really like the inaccurate portrayal of the authors but it’s fiction so what can you do.

I also don’t like Dazai. PM Dazai has my heart, but I don’t feel comfortable making nsfw of a 15 year old so i went with 18 because Google said he left when he was 18 so this is set sometime before that.

My point of that spiel is that I haven’t watched/read very much of bsd so I apologize for inaccuracies. Hope it’s useable
creator: Nevvus2
